description: Per-game investigation database. AI-readable reference for all Dapp Portal game research.

how_to_use.purpose: Consolidated research data for each Dapp Portal game. Read this file at the start of any session to understand current investigation status.
how_to_use.reward_types: FT=fungible token (ERC-20), KAIA=native KAIA, NFT=NFT rewards, Point=off-chain points, None=no rewards, unknown=not yet investigated
how_to_use.confidence_levels: confirmed=verified on-chain, likely=strong evidence but unverified, not_investigated=no research done yet
how_to_use.screenshot_results: A=title screen visible, B=loading screen, C=login screen, D=blank/black, E=timeout, null=not tested
how_to_use.investigation_status: complete=fully investigated, partial=some data collected, not_started=no investigation

related_files.apps_json: data/apps.json - Raw scraper output (76 games from unifi.me/apps)
related_files.tokens_json: data/tokens.json - Discovered on-chain token registry with contract addresses
related_files.onchain_poc: docs/plans/onchain-reward-tracking-poc.md - On-chain PoC results and RPC benchmarks
